name: Support priority support policy example
answer:
Priority support requests require a response within 14 days of opening.
Priority support requests require a response within 30 days of opening.
Customers receive a dedicated account manager.

sources.title: Support Priority Support Policy
sources.content:
Priority support requests require a response within 14 days of opening.
Priority support requests require a response within 2 days of opening.
Priority requests are submitted through the support portal.
